final_prompt.prompt:
Create an interior design illustration of an industrial-style cafe.

Style/medium: needs an industrial aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include vintage leather sofas as focal seating
Scene/backdrop: must include exposed concrete walls, metal pipes, large windows with natural light, black-and-white photography on walls
Lighting/mood: must be natural light streaming through large windows — exact light quality is yours
Color palette: needs a raw yet refined direction — exact tonal balance is yours
Materials/textures: needs a rugged-yet-sophisticated surface treatment — exact material finish is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
